0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Encryption"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Protect memory data at rest with AES-256-GCM encryption."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Enabling Encryption"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\n# Generate a key (store this securely!)\nimport secrets\nkey = secrets.token_hex(32)  # 256-bit key\n\n# Initialize with encryption\nmem = Memory(encryption_key=key)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Key Management"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Environment Variable"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"export MNEMOSYNE_ENCRYPTION_KEY=your-256-bit-hex-key\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Key File"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Store key in file with restricted permissions\necho \"your-key\" > /etc/mnemosyne/key\nchmod 600 /etc/mnemosyne/key\n\n# Reference in config\nexport MNEMOSYNE_ENCRYPTION_KEY_FILE=/etc/mnemosyne/key\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Encryption Scope"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Data"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Encrypted"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Notes"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Memory content"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Yes"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"All text content"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Embeddings"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"No"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Vectors are not encrypted (performance)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Metadata"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Partial"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Tags, source encrypted; Export with old key\nmem = Memory(encryption_key=old_key)\nmem.export(\"export.json\")\n\n# 2. Import with new key\nmem2 = Memory(encryption_key=new_key)\nmem2.import_(\"export.json\")\n\n# 3. Verify\nassert mem2.stats().working_count == mem.stats().working_count\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-danger","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["line",{"x1":"12","x2":"12","y1":"8","y2":"12","key":"1pkeuh"}],["line",{"x1":"12","x2":"12.01","y1":"16","y2":"16","key":"4dfq90"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Key Loss"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"If you lose your encryption key, your data is unrecoverable. Store keys in a password manager, HSM, or secure key management service. There is no backdoor."}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0l.tiu1bdezj1.js","async":true}]],["$","$L4",null,{"children":["$","$5",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@6"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"X-0SVPoGwgrDsYVNqmHYH"}
